_about: DEEP ECONOMICS ADVANCED corpus 2026-05-01. Macroeconomics, monetary theory, behavioral economics, game theory in economics, market microstructure, public economics, development economics. Beyond surface econ.
macroeconomics: GDP is operator-LATTICE-OF-MARKET-PRODUCTION; sum of value-added across sectors; misses non-market work (caregiving) + degraded environments.
Inflation is operator-PRICE-LEVEL-RISE; cost-push (supply shock) demand-pull (overheated economy) wage-price spiral; central banks target ~2%.
Unemployment is operator-INVOLUNTARY-IDLENESS in labor market; frictional (search) cyclical (recession) structural (skills mismatch); natural rate ~4-5%.
Phillips curve is operator-INVERSE-COUPLING between unemployment and inflation; broke down in 1970s stagflation; modern revisions account for expectations.
Aggregate demand = consumption + investment + government + net exports; operator-LATTICE-of-spending sources.
Aggregate supply: short-run (sticky prices/wages) + long-run (potential output); shocks shift each.
Business cycle is operator-EXPANSION-PEAK-CONTRACTION-TROUGH; ~7-10 year average; recessions defined by NBER (US), differently elsewhere.
Fiscal policy is operator-GOVERNMENT-SPENDING + taxation; expansionary (deficit) contractionary (surplus); Keynesian-counter-cyclical.
Output gap is operator-DIFFERENCE-actual-vs-potential-GDP; positive = inflationary pressure, negative = unemployment.
Okun's law: ~2% drop in GDP for each 1% rise in unemployment above natural rate; operator-COUPLING-empirical.
Solow growth model: long-run growth = operator-TECHNOLOGY-PROGRESS + capital + labor; technology is the unmoved mover.
monetary_theory: Central bank is operator-MONETARY-AUTHORITY; sets short-term interest rate, manages money supply, lender of last resort.
Federal Reserve (US) operator-DUAL-MANDATE: maximum employment + stable prices; ECB single-mandate (price stability).
Money supply: M0 (base) M1 (cash + checking) M2 (+ savings + small time deposits) M3 (+ large time + institutional MMF).
Quantitative easing (QE) is operator-CENTRAL-BANK-BUYS-BONDS to lower long-term rates when short rates at zero bound.
Reserve requirement is operator-MINIMUM-DEPOSIT-FRACTION held at central bank; lowered to 0% in many places post-2020.
Federal funds rate is operator-OVERNIGHT-INTERBANK-LENDING-rate; what Fed targets directly.
Yield curve is operator-LATTICE-OF-RATES-BY-MATURITY; normal upward-sloping; inverted predicts recession ~85% historical accuracy.
Inflation targeting is operator-EXPLICIT-2%-target; transparency anchors expectations.
Quantity theory of money: MV = PY; if velocity stable, money supply growth determines inflation; modern revisions complicate.
Bitcoin + cryptocurrencies challenge operator-STATE-MONETARY-MONOPOLY; volatile + energy-intensive + adoption uneven.
Modern Monetary Theory (MMT) is operator-FISCAL-DOMINATES-MONETARY view; government deficit = private surplus; inflation is the binding constraint, not deficits.
behavioral_econ_advanced: Prospect theory: operator-REFERENCE-DEPENDENT-VALUATION; gains and losses asymmetric; loss aversion ~2.25 (Kahneman + Tversky).
Endowment effect is operator-OWNERSHIP-CHANGES-VALUE; people demand more to give up something than they would pay to acquire it.
Sunk cost fallacy is operator-PAST-COSTS-INFLUENCE-FUTURE-DECISIONS; rationally irrelevant but powerfully felt.
Mental accounting: operator-MONEY-SEPARATED-BY-PURPOSE; bonus spent more freely than salary; gas-money vs grocery-money.
Default effects are operator-PASSIVE-CHOICE-WINS; opt-out organ donation rates >> opt-in.
Hyperbolic discounting: operator-PRESENT-BIAS; near rewards weighted disproportionately vs future.
Status quo bias is operator-INERTIA-WINS; existing state favored even when alternatives objectively better.
Framing effects: operator-LOSS-FRAME-vs-GAIN-FRAME; '90% survival' vs '10% mortality' produce different choices, same info.
Availability heuristic is operator-EASY-RECALL-MEANS-COMMON; vivid events overestimated, mundane ones underestimated.
Confirmation bias is operator-SEEK-CONFIRMING-EVIDENCE; underweight disconfirming.
Behavioral economics in policy: operator-NUDGE-WITHOUT-MANDATE; default options + simplification + reminders (Thaler + Sunstein).
market_microstructure: Order book is operator-LATTICE-OF-BID-ASK-LIMIT-ORDERS at each price; depth = liquidity at price levels.
Bid-ask spread is operator-DIFFERENCE-BUY-vs-SELL-price; reflects liquidity + adverse selection + market-maker profit.
Market maker is operator-CONTINUOUS-LIQUIDITY-PROVIDER; profits from spread, takes inventory risk.
High-frequency trading is operator-MICROSECOND-LATENCY-ADVANTAGE; co-located servers, fiber-optic + microwave links between exchanges.
Market impact is operator-PRICE-MOVE-CAUSED-BY-ORDER; large orders move price against you.
VWAP (Volume Weighted Average Price) is operator-EXECUTION-BENCHMARK; large orders broken up to track VWAP.
Limit order book dynamics: operator-LATTICE-of-arriving-and-departing-orders; survives stylized facts (fat tails, volatility clustering).
Flash crash 2010 is operator-LIQUIDITY-VACUUM; algos withdraw simultaneously, prices crater + recover within minutes.
Dark pools are operator-OFF-EXCHANGE-VENUES; large institutions trade without showing intent to public market.
Adverse selection is operator-COUNTER-INFORMATION-RISK; market maker quotes against possibly-informed traders.
Kyle's lambda is operator-PRICE-IMPACT-COEFFICIENT; how much volume moves price; foundational microstructure model.
public_development_economics: Public goods are operator-NON-RIVAL-NON-EXCLUDABLE; markets under-provide; clean air, basic research, lighthouses.
Externalities are operator-COSTS-OR-BENEFITS-TO-THIRD-PARTIES; pollution (negative) vaccinations (positive); market price misses.
Pigovian tax internalizes operator-EXTERNALITY-COST; carbon tax on pollution, cigarette tax on health externalities.
Cap and trade creates operator-MARKET-FOR-PERMITS; total allowable damage capped, allocated efficiently via trade.
Tragedy of commons is operator-COLLECTIVE-OVER-EXTRACTION; individual incentives overwhelm sustainability (overgrazing, overfishing).
Coase theorem: with operator-LOW-TRANSACTION-COSTS-AND-CLEAR-PROPERTY-RIGHTS, parties bargain to efficient outcome regardless of initial allocation.
Development economics asks operator-WHY-SOME-COUNTRIES-RICH; institutions + geography + culture + accidents of history all proposed.
Acemoglu + Robinson (Why Nations Fail): operator-INCLUSIVE-VS-EXTRACTIVE-INSTITUTIONS as decisive factor.
Banerjee + Duflo (Poor Economics): operator-RANDOMIZED-CONTROLLED-TRIALS in development; what actually works in poverty alleviation.
Resource curse is operator-COUNTER-INTUITIVE; resource-rich countries often grow slower; institutions distorted by rent-seeking.
Global income distribution: operator-LATTICE-OF-INEQUALITY; ~10% live on <$2/day, ~50% <$7/day, top 1% >$50K (PPP).
directive: Economics is operator-LATTICE-OF-CHOICE-UNDER-CONSTRAINT; mathematical, behavioral, political, ethical all entangled.
Modern economics integrates operator-NEOCLASSICAL + behavioral + institutional + heterodox; consensus on some, debate on much.
When user asks about specific economic question, CK can map to operator-LATTICE-of-frameworks + identify what's empirically established vs theoretically contested.
CK does not give investment advice; he describes mechanisms, refers to professional financial advisors for personal decisions.
